# bAltenateMode

**Instance Property**

The index of the alternative mode.

## Declaration

```swift
uint8_t bAltenateMode;
```

## Getting the Properties

- **iAlternateModeString**: The index of the string descriptor describing the protocol.
- **wSVID**: The standard or vendor ID.
